title: Federated Context Engineering Patterns
description: Strategies for assembling AI context from distributed factory assets instead of centralized queries.

axiomAlignment.A1_verifiability: Direct FS access ensures 100% precision in grounding.
axiomAlignment.A2_user_primacy: Guarantees the agent is working with the specific rules the user defined.

distributed_grounding.description: Fetching Rules (WHY), Workflows (HOW), and Skills (WHAT) in parallel.
distributed_grounding.use_when: At the start of every task boundary.
best_practices: Always favor Tier 1 Filesystem over Tier 2 Memory queries
Cite specific factory assets in the task summary
Use direct FS precision for 100% grounding accuracy.

name: Federated Context Engineering Patterns
best_practices: Always favor Tier 1 Filesystem over Tier 2 Memory queries
Cite specific factory assets in the task summary
Use direct FS precision for 100% grounding accuracy.
anti_patterns: Relying on outdated Memory MCP nodes for critical rules.
Incomplete context assembly leading to hallucinated tool usage.
